sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, name String, created_at DateTime, score Float64, complex_name String DEFAULT 'default_value');

SELECT normalizeQueryKeepNames('SELECT id, name, score FROM test_table WHERE score > 80 AND name IS NOT NULL AND created_at < NOW()'), (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table WHERE created_at > '2023-10-01') AS active_count;
SELECT id, name, created_at FROM (SELECT id, name, created_at, score FROM test_table WHERE normalizeQueryKeepNames(name) LIKE '%li%') AS subquery WHERE score IS NULL OR score > 75;
SELECT SUM(score) OVER (PARTITION BY name ORDER BY created_at) AS cumulative_score FROM (SELECT id, name, score, created_at FROM test_table WHERE created_at >= '2023-10-01') AS grouped_table;
SELECT complex_name, COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT id, normalizeQueryKeepNames(name) AS complex_name FROM test_table GROUP BY id, name) GROUP BY complex_name HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
SELECT AVG(score) AS average_score FROM test_table WHERE score IS NOT NULL AND created_at BETWEEN '2023-10-01' AND '2023-10-02';
SELECT id -> (x -> x + 1) AS incremented_id FROM test_table;
SELECT id, normalizeQueryKeepNames('SELECT score FROM test_table WHERE id = ' || toString(id)) FROM test_table;
SELECT id, score FROM test_table ORDER BY (normalizeQueryKeepNames(name) IS NULL OR normalizeQueryKeepNames(name) = '') DESC, created_at DESC;
